texto: I didn't really know what to expect, but I thought there aren't a lot of rap groups that can say they have a documentary done about them, so my attitude was like, 'Shoot, why not?' I'm sure there are a lot of people that would like to take our place. I felt like we should all embrace it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Phife Dawg: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I didn't really know what to expect, but I thought there aren't a lot of rap groups that can say …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, thought, people pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de people e know.

frase_original: I didn't really know what to expect, but I thought there aren't a lot of rap groups that can say they have a documentary done about them, so my attitude was like, 'Shoot, why not?' I'm sure there are a lot of people that would like to take our place. I felt like we should all embrace it.
